s1.intro: I'm more than someone who builds you a page, and I'm not Google or Meta. Whatever I make, I make for you specifically — I'll teach you to run it, or keep running it for you, your call.

cards.title: Raw site
cards.text: Clean, fast, simple. No bloat, no subscriptions — just a site that works.

cards.title: WordPress site
cards.text: Same simplicity, plus a real backend — blog, forum, magazine or news feed you can edit yourself.

cards.title: Basic maintenance
cards.text: Weekly backups. Peace of mind, nothing more, nothing less.

cards.title: Advanced maintenance
cards.text: Backups, security checks, updates and monthly content edits — I keep it running so you don't have to.

s2.h2: Your drives, boards & spaces — kept yours
s2.intro: Shared drives, planning boards, a private space for your team or community — set up on infrastructure you actually control, so nobody can change the price or the rules on you overnight.

items.title: Shared drives
items.text: Team files, organized — hosted on infrastructure you own, not a rented account.

items.title: Online boards
items.text: Planning and community boards set up to match how your group actually works.

items.title: Collaboration spaces
items.text: A private hub for a team, club or collective — docs, chat and resources in one place.

marketing.h2: Getting found, and making it worth the click

items.title: SEO / GEO
items.text: Writing and structure reviewed for how people search — and how AI answers. I'll teach you the process, automate the repetitive parts, or run it for you.

items.title: Landing pages
items.text: Scan a code, click a link, land somewhere built to convert — for one campaign, or as a permanent asset.

items.title: Gadgets & artifacts
items.text: Quizzes, games, drag-and-drop tools — small interactive pieces that earn attention instead of just holding it.
